title: Europe’s Options in the Strait of Hormuz: Few, and Risky
summary_full: European leaders and other officials have ideas for bringing shipping back to the strait once the Iran war ends. But none of them are sure bets.
summary_public: European leaders and other officials have ideas for bringing shipping back to the strait once the Iran war ends. But none of them are sure bets.
